mapper.select: SELECT status_history_id, subscription_id, status, effective_start_date, effective_end_date, created_at FROM subscription_status_history WHERE subscription_id = #{subscriptionId} AND effective_end_date IS NULL ORDER BY effective_start_date DESC, status_history_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT status_history_id, subscription_id, status, effective_start_date, effective_end_date, created_at FROM subscription_status_history WHERE subscription_id = #{subscriptionId} ORDER BY effective_start_date ASC, status_history_id ASC

SELECT h.status_history_id, h.subscription_id, h.status, h.effective_start_date, h.effective_end_date, h.created_at FROM subscription_status_history h INNER JOIN subscription s ON h.subscription_id = s.subscription_id WHERE s.member_id = #{memberId} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND h.effective_start_date <= #{endDate} AND (h.effective_end_date IS NULL OR h.effective_end_date >= #{startDate}) ORDER BY h.subscription_id ASC, h.effective_start_date ASC, h.status_history_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subscription_status_history ( subscription_id, status, effective_start_date, effective_end_date ) VALUES ( #{subscriptionId}, #{status}, #{effectiveStartDate}, #{effectiveEndDate} )
